sections.text: L'epreuve comporte les parties A et B.
sections.en: The exam consists of two independent parts A and B.

sections.title: PARTIE A - EVALUATION DES RESSOURCES
sections.en: PART A – RESOURCE ASSESSMENT:

sections.text: Cette partie comporte deux activites : une activite numerique et geometrique.
sections.en: This part includes two activities: a numerical activity and a geometrical activity.

sections.title: ACTIVITES NUMERIQUES
sections.en: NUMERICAL ACTIVITIES:

sections.text: Cette partie comporte trois exercices independants 1, 2 et 3.
sections.en: This part includes three independent exercises: 1, 2 and 3.

sections.title: Exercice 1
sections.en: Exercise 1:

sections.text: On considere le nombre $A=\frac{2+\sqrt{3}}{2-\sqrt{3}}$.
sections.en: Consider the number $A=\frac{2+\sqrt{3}}{2-\sqrt{3}}$.

sections.text: 1. Calculer $(2+\sqrt{3})^2$. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 1. Calculate $(2+\sqrt{3})^2$. 0.5 pt

sections.text: 2. Montrer que $A=7+4\sqrt{3}$. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 2. Show that $A=7+4\sqrt{3}$. 0.5 pt

sections.text: 3. Sachant que $1,732<\sqrt{3}<1,733$, determiner un encadrement de $A$ par deux nombres decimaux d'ordre 2. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 3. Given that $1.732<\sqrt{3}<1.733$, determine bounds for $A$ between two decimal numbers of order $2$. 0.5 pt

sections.title: Exercice 2
sections.en: Exercise 2:

sections.text: 1. On considere l'expression $B=(x-2)^2+(x-2)(x+4)$.
sections.en: 1. Consider the expression $B=(x-2)^2+(x-2)(x+4)$.

sections.text: Ecrire $B$ sous la forme d'un produit de facteurs du premier degre. 0,75 pt
sections.en: Write $B$ as a product of first-degree factors. 0.75 pt

sections.text: 2. On considere la fraction rationnelle $C=\frac{(x-2)(2x+1)}{(x-2)(x+3)}$.
sections.en: 2. Consider the rational fraction $C=\frac{(x-2)(2x+1)}{(x-2)(x+3)}$.

sections.text: Donner la condition d'existence d'une valeur numerique de $C$ puis simplifier $C$. 0,75 pt
sections.en: State the condition for the existence of a numerical value of $C$, then simplify $C$. 0.75 pt

sections.title: Exercice 3
sections.en: Exercise 3:

sections.text: Le tableau suivant recapitule les notes sur 20 en mathematiques de 50 eleves d'une classe de troisieme avec une donnee manquante.
sections.en: The following table summarizes the mathematics scores out of 20 of 50 students in a third-year class, with one missing value.

sections.text: $$\begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline\text{Notes} & [0;4[ & [4;8[ & [8;12[ & [12;16[ & [16;20[ \\ \hline\text{Effectifs} & 13 & 15 & 10 & 5 & \text{?} \\ \hline\end{array}$$
sections.en: $$\begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline\text{Scores} & [0;4[ & [4;8[ & [8;12[ & [12;16[ & [16;20[ \\ \hline\text{Frequencies} & 13 & 15 & 10 & 5 & \text{?} \\ \hline\end{array}$$

sections.text: 1. Quel est le caractere etudie et quelle est sa nature ? 0,5 pt
sections.en: 1. What is the variable studied and what is its nature? 0.5 pt

sections.text: 2. Justifier que l'effectif de la classe $[16;20[$ est 7. 0,25 pt
sections.en: 2. Justify that the frequency of the class $[16;16[$ is 7. 0.25 pt

sections.text: 3. Quelle est la classe modale de cette serie statistique ? 0,25 pt
sections.en: 3. What is the modal class of this statistical series? 0.25 pt

sections.text: 4. Calculer la moyenne des notes sur 20 en mathematiques de cette classe. 1 pt
sections.en: 4. Calculate the mean score out of 20 in mathematics for this class. 1 pt

sections.title: ACTIVITES GEOMETRIQUES
sections.en: GEOMETRICAL ACTIVITIES:

sections.text: Cette partie comporte trois exercices independants 1, 2 et 3.
sections.en: This part includes two independent exercises: 1 and 2.

sections.title: Exercice 1
sections.en: Exercise 1:

sections.text: Le plan est muni d'un repere orthonorme $(O,I,J)$. On considere les points $A$, $B$ et $C$ de coordonnees respectives $(2;2)$ ; $(-3;1)$ et $(4;-2)$.
sections.en: The plane is equipped with an orthonormal coordinate system $(O,I,J)$. Consider the points $A$, $B$ and $C$ with respective coordinates $(2;2)$, $(-3;1)$ and $(4;-2)$.

sections.text: Repondre par Vrai ou Faux :
sections.en: Answer True or False to each of the following questions:

sections.text: 1. Le couple de coordonnees du vecteur $\overrightarrow{AB}$ est $(-5;-1)$. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 1. The coordinate pair of the vector $\overrightarrow{AB}$ is: $(-5;-1)$. 0.5 pt

sections.text: 2. La distance $AC$ est egale a $3\sqrt{3}$. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 2. The distance $AC$ is equal to $3\sqrt{3}$. 0.5 pt

sections.text: 3. Une equation cartesienne de la droite $(AB)$ est $x-5y+8=0$. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 3. A Cartesian equation of the line $(AB)$ is: $x-5y+8=0$. 0.5 pt

sections.title: Exercice 2
sections.en: Exercise 2:

sections.text: Sur la figure ci-contre, $ABC$ est un triangle rectangle en $C$ tel que $AB=5cm$, $BC=3cm$ et $AC=4cm$. $E$ est un point de $[AB]$ tel que $AE=4cm$. La droite passant par $E$ et parallele a $(BC)$ coupe $[AC]$ en $F$. $(C)$ est le cercle de centre $O$, circonscrit au triangle $ABC$. $M$ est un point du cercle $(C)$.
sections.en: In the adjacent figure, $ABC$ is a right triangle at $C$ such that: $AB=5cm$; $BC=3cm$ and $AC=4cm$. $E$ is the point on segment $[AB]$ such that $AE=4cm$. The line passing through $E$ and parallel to $(BC)$ intersects segment $[AC]$ at $F$. $(C)$ is the circle with center $O$, circumscribed about triangle $ABC$. $M$ is a point on the circle $(C)$.

sections.text: Figure geometrique BEPC 2024 - exercice 2
sections.en: Geometrical activity solution 21

sections.text: 1. Calculer $\cos\widehat{BAC}$ et en deduire l'arrondi a $10^{-1}$ pres de la mesure de l'angle $\widehat{BAC}$. 0,75 pt
sections.en: 1. Calculate $\cos\widehat{BAC}$ and deduce the value of the measure of angle $\widehat{BAC}$ rounded to the nearest $10^{-1}$. 0.75 pt

sections.text: 2. Justifier que les angles $\widehat{BAC}$ et $\widehat{BMC}$ ont la meme mesure. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 2. Justify that the angles $\widehat{BAC}$ and $\widehat{BMC}$ have the same measure. 0.5 pt

sections.text: 3. Calculer la distance $EF$. 0,75 pt
sections.en: 3. Calculate the distance $EF$. 0.75 pt

sections.title: Exercice 3
sections.en: Exercise 3

sections.text: La figure ci-contre represente une pyramide reguliere $SABCD$ de hauteur $SM=6cm$ et dont la base est carree de cote $AB=4cm$.
sections.en: The adjacent figure represents a regular pyramid $SABCD$ with height $SM=6cm$ and a square base with side $AB=4cm$.

sections.text: On coupe cette pyramide suivant un plan parallele a la base et passant par le point $N$ tel que $SN=\frac{1}{2}SM$.
sections.en: This pyramid is cut by a plane parallel to the base and passing through point $N$ such that $SN=\frac{1}{2}SM$.

sections.text: Figure geometrique BEPC 2024 - exercice 3
sections.en: Geometrical activity solution 22

sections.text: 1. Calculer le volume $V$ de la pyramide $SABCD$. 0,75 pt
sections.en: 1. Calculate the volume $V$ of the pyramid $SABCD$. 0.75 pt

sections.text: 2. En deduire le volume $v$ de la pyramide reduite $SEFGH$. 0,75 pt
sections.en: 2. Deduce the volume $v$ of the reduced pyramid $SEFGH$. 0.75 pt

sections.title: PARTIE B - EVALUATION DES COMPETENCES
sections.en: PART B – SKILLS ASSESSMENT:

sections.title: Situation
sections.en: Situation:

sections.text: Le proprietaire d'un hotel voudrait effectuer des travaux de refection. Son comptable a envisage de faire financer les $\frac{2}{5}$ du montant total du budget des travaux par une banque, le $\frac{1}{4}$ du montant total de ce budget par une partie des recettes et le reste, soit la somme de $12\ 225\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$ par ses economies personnelles.
sections.en: The owner of a hotel would like to carry out renovation work. His accountant planned to finance $\frac{2}{5}$ of the total renovation budget through a bank, $\frac{1}{4}$ of the total budget from part of the revenue, and the remainder, that is the sum of $1\ 2225\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$, from his personal savings.

sections.text: Avant de commencer les travaux, il voudrait connaitre le montant exact du budget total des travaux, mais son comptable est absent.
sections.en: Before starting the work, he would like to know the exact total budget amount, but his accountant is absent.

sections.text: Une partie des travaux concerne le renouvellement du carrelage d'une cuisine de forme rectangulaire de longueur $4,80$ metres et largeur $3$ metres. Il envisage utiliser des carreaux carres ayant la plus grande dimension possible, poses sans espaces.
sections.en: Part of the work concerns replacing the tiles of a rectangular kitchen measuring $4.80$ meters in length and $3$ meters in width. He plans to use square tiles of the largest possible size, laid without gaps. He therefore wants to know the minimum number of tiles to purchase.

sections.text: Une autre partie des travaux concerne la peinture des murs. Il a achete un total de $10$ seaux de peinture comprenant des seaux de peinture a huile et a eau. Un seau de peinture a eau coute $40\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$ et un seau de peinture a huile $60\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$ pour un montant total de $440\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$.
sections.en: Another part of the work concerns painting the walls. For this purpose, he purchased a total of $10$ buckets of paint, including oil-based paint and water-based paint. The hardware store sold him one bucket of water-based paint for $40\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$ and one bucket of oil-based paint for $60\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$ for a total amount of $440\ 000\ \text{FCFA}$. At the time of delivery, he would like to verify the number of buckets of each type.

sections.title: Taches
sections.en: Tasks:

sections.text: 1. Calculer le montant total du budget des travaux de refection. 3 pts
sections.en: 1. Calculate the total renovation budget 3 pts

sections.text: 2. Calculer le nombre minimal de carreaux a acheter pour le renouvellement du carrelage. 3 pts
sections.en: 2. Calculate the minimum number of tiles to purchase for replacing the flooring 3 pts

sections.text: 3. Calculer le nombre de seaux de peinture de chaque type qui ont ete achetes. 3 pts
sections.en: 3. Calculate the number of paint buckets of each type that were purchased. 3 pts
